calendar.matters:
Hearing On Defendants, Carrie Smart And Brandie Perry'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment On The Court'S Own Motion So Defendants Can Provide A Proposed Responsive Pleadings Per Ccp 473(E)
Off Calendar Dec-22-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. DEFENDANTS CARRIE SMITH AND BRANDIE PERRY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT: OFF CALENDAR per moving party. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Motion To Set Aside Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-16-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Dave Crow, Esq. (415) 552-9060 for Defendants and Moving Party Carrie Smith and Brandie Perry
David J. Foran, Esq. (415) 440-6668 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Gregory Gifford
RULING:
A R G U E D. Motion For Stay to 12/22/03 is GRANTED; rent shall be paid to 12/22/03. The Court's tentative ruling was adopted: DEFENDANT CARRIE SMART and BRANDIE PERRY'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment: CONTINUED to 12/22/03 on the Court's own motion so Defendants can provide a proposed responsive pleading per CCP 473(e). Should the Court grant the Motion, this is not an order permitting filing of the pleading; nor is this an order granting the motion to set aside the default. Order signed. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-10-2003 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-03-2003 Continued To Feb-10-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
